title: Strategic Initiative Mapping Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Strategic Initiative Mapping skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

strategic_objectives_priority.description: Strategic objectives with priority weighting (must-win battles, growth pillars, or equivalent)

full_list_candidate.description: Full list of candidate initiatives with rough scoping, sponsor and strategic theme classification

resource_envelope_defining.description: Resource envelope defining available budget, headcount and time horizon

existing_commitments_run.description: Existing commitments, run-the-business obligations and known dependencies between initiatives

initiative_feasibility_assessments.description: Initiative feasibility assessments or pre-read business cases

sponsor_alignment_status.description: Sponsor alignment status and political readiness signals

external_benchmarks_on.description: External benchmarks on implementation timelines for comparable initiatives
